data.name: InvalidPhoneNumber
data.value: Please enter a valid phone number.

data.name: AddressNotValid
data.value: Field can contain letters, numbers and symbols "",.- №.

data.name: OnlyDecimalNumbersAllowed
data.value: Field can contain only decimal numbers.

data.name: LettersNumbersAllowed
data.value: Field can contain letters and numbers

data.name: LettersNumbersEnglAllowed
data.value: Field can contain Latin letters and numbers

data.name: ErrorWhileCreatingCheckData
data.value: Error while creating, please check the entered data!

data.name: UserIsNotRegistered
data.value: User does not exist in the system!

data.name: InvalidPasswordFormat
data.value: Invalid password. Password must be in Latin letters, contain at least 6 characters, at least one digit, one uppercase and one lowercase letter, and at least one special character.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: UserWithThisEmailExists
data.value: User with this email already exists.

data.name: DefaultError
data.value: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: AgreeWithTerms
data.value: You must accept the terms and conditions.

data.name: ProveYouAreNotRobot
data.value: Please confirm you are not a robot.

data.name: ValidEmailAddress
data.value: If the email exists, we have sent a recovery link.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccess
data.value: Password changed successfully! You can now login with your new password.

data.name: EmailApprovedSuccess
data.value: Your email has been confirmed! You can now make reservations.

data.name: EmailAlreadyApproved
data.value: Account already confirmed or does not exist.

data.name: GoodBye
data.value: Goodbye! We hope to see you again soon.

data.name: SuccessfulDeletedAccount
data.value: Profile deleted! See you next time.

data.name: SuccessfulUserEdit
data.value: You successfully edited the user data

data.name: FillInAllFields
data.value: Please fill in all required fields correctly.

data.name: TicketSendSuccessfully
data.value: Your request was sent successfully! Check your email for confirmation.

data.name: ProfileNotApprovedForCreatingPlace
data.value: Your profile is not confirmed. Please confirm your email to add places.

data.name: ReservationNeedApproval
data.value: You must confirm your email before making a reservation!

data.name: CommentNeedApproval
data.value: You must confirm your email before adding a comment!

data.name: DescribeYourIssue
data.value: Please describe your problem or question in detail.

data.name: IssueLenght
data.value: Description must be at least 10 characters.

data.name: PlaceUpdatedSuccessfully
data.value: You successfully edited the place data.

data.name: PlaceDeletedSuccessfully
data.value: Place and all related data were deleted.

data.name: DateError
data.value: End date cannot be before start date.

data.name: UserBanned
data.value: User was blocked and deleted successfully.

data.name: PlaceIsClosedOnThisDate
data.value: Place is closed for reservations on this date due to

data.name: MaximumComments
data.value: You have already left the maximum number of comments (3) for this place.

data.name: CannotCancelPastReservation
data.value: You cannot cancel a past reservation.

data.name: SearchHeroSubtitle
data.value: Easy, fast and convenient booking anytime.

data.name: AboutTitle
data.value: Your digital assistant for an active life

data.name: AboutDescription
data.value: ActPro is an innovative platform that connects enthusiasts with sports facilities. Our mission is to remove barriers to sport by giving you access to hundreds of places with just a few clicks.

data.name: BenefitsDescription
data.value: Forget the dozens of phone calls to find out if the tennis court is free. With us you save time and nerves:

data.name: ProbInfoDesc
data.value: No need to search for contacts on forums - everything is in one place.

data.name: ProbScheduleDesc
data.value: You see only available times, updated in real-time.

data.name: ProbReviewDesc
data.value: You can now express your opinion about the place you visited.

data.name: OwnerTitle
data.value: Do you have a sports place?

data.name: OwnerSubtitle
data.value: Become part of our network in three easy steps and increase your customers.

data.name: StorySubtitle
data.value: We don't just make software. We build a community where health and sports are a priority for everyone.

data.name: MissionDesc
data.value: To make sport accessible for every Bulgarian through modern technology.

data.name: VisionDesc
data.value: The largest ecosystem for active recreation and sports facility management in the country.

data.name: ValuesDesc
data.value: Transparency, innovation and unwavering support for local business and sports clubs.

data.name: JsToastSelectCity
data.value: Please select a city from the suggestions!

data.name: ButtonValid24Hours
data.value: Button is valid for the next 24 hours.

data.name: IgnoreEmail
data.value: If you did not register with us, please ignore this email.

data.name: ShowEmailOnArrival
data.value: Please show this email upon arrival.

data.name: ReservationCanceledText
data.value: We inform you that the following reservation was cancelled:

data.name: BookNewTime
data.value: If you want to book a new time, you can do so through our platform.

data.name: PasswordResetRequestText
data.value: We received a request to recover your password. Click the button below to set a new one.

data.name: IgnorePasswordReset
data.value: If you did not request a change, please ignore this email.

data.name: PasswordChangedConfirmText
data.value: This email confirms that your password was successfully changed.

data.name: ImportantSecurityWarning
data.value: Important: If you did not initiate this change, please contact our support immediately as your account security may be compromised.

data.name: IgnoreIfNoChange
data.value: If you made the change, you can ignore this message.

data.name: ProfileDeletedText
data.value: Your profile in ActPro has been successfully deleted from our system, along with all associated personal data and history.

data.name: SorryToSeeYouGo
data.value: We're sorry to see you go. You're always welcome back!

data.name: PlaceApprovedText
data.value: We are pleased to inform you that your place has passed verification and is now active on the platform.

data.name: PlaceCanBeBooked
data.value: Users can now browse and make reservations at your place.

data.name: PlaceRejectedText
data.value: After reviewing your place, we found that it does not meet the platform requirements in its current form.

data.name: MakeCorrectionsAndRetry
data.value: Please make the necessary corrections and submit the request again.

data.name: PlaceDeletedByAdminText
data.value: We inform you that your place has been removed from our platform by an administrator.

data.name: ContactSupportIfMistake
data.value: If you think this is a mistake, please contact our support.

data.name: ReservationTimeChangedText
data.value: We inform you that the time of your reservation has been changed.

data.name: WelcomeToActPro
data.value: Thank you for choosing ActPro. Just a few more steps before you can book your favorite sports halls.

data.name: SupportTicketReceivedSubject
data.value: ActPro - Your request has been received

data.name: ThankYouForContacting
data.value: Thank you for contacting us! Your request regarding

data.name: TeamWillContact
data.value: Our team will review the information and contact you within 24 hours.

data.name: AutoMessageDisclaimer
data.value: This is an automatic message, please do not reply to it.

data.name: YouHaveNewBooking
data.value: You have a new reservation for your place

data.name: ManageReservationsFromPanel
data.value: You can view details and manage the reservation from your panel.

data.name: CustomerCancelledBooking
data.value: Customer cancelled their reservation at your place

data.name: TimeNowAvailable
data.value: The time is now available and can be reserved by other users.

data.name: UserLeftComment
data.value: User left a new comment for your place

data.name: FeedbackImportantForBusiness
data.value: Feedback is important for your business development!

data.name: IfNewTimeNotConvenient
data.value: If the new time is not convenient for you, you can cancel the reservation from your profile.

data.name: AdminChangedReservationTime
data.value: Admin changed the time of your reservation for

data.name: EmailNotConfirmed
data.value: Your profile is not confirmed. Please check your email to unlock all features.

data.name: FindAndBookSports
data.value: Find and book sports activities easily and quickly across the country with just one click. What are you waiting for?

data.name: CreatedForNOIT
data.value: Site created for NOIT 2025/2026. Authors: Alexander Dralev and Iliyan Mitev

data.name: NoPlacesMatchCriteria
data.value: Currently there are no places matching your criteria for city

data.name: TryChangingFilters
data.value: Try changing the price or searching for another activity.

data.name: BanUserWarning
data.value: WARNING: This will add the email and phone to a blacklist and delete the profile!

data.name: ConfirmDeletePlace
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: ConfirmCancelReservation
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?

data.name: CheckEmailForConfirmation
data.value: Check your email for a confirmation link.

data.name: CheckEmailForResetLink
data.value: Check your email for a password reset link.

data.name: DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: NewsSubtitle
data.value: Be the first to learn about our new projects and achievements.

data.name: NoNewsAvailable
data.value: No news available at the moment

data.name: MustBeLoggedIn
data.value: You must be logged in to like!

data.name: FillPlaceDetails
data.value: Fill in the details of your place and start accepting reservations.

data.name: DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Tell more about the conditions you offer...

data.name: DragDropImages
data.value: Drag and drop images here or click to select

data.name: SupportedFormats
data.value: Supported formats: JPG, PNG (Maximum 5MB per file)

data.name: NoFavoritesYet
data.value: You haven't added any favorite places yet.

data.name: CreditsInfo
data.value: Earn credits through activity on the platform and unlock exclusive levels and discounts!

data.name: ManageYourReviews
data.value: Here you can view and manage all your reviews for visited places.

data.name: NoReviewsYet
data.value: You don't have any reviews yet.

data.name: EmailNotConfirmedText
data.value: Your profile is not confirmed. Please check your email to unlock all features.

data.name: DeleteProfileWarning
data.value: This operation is irreversible. All your data and favorite places will be deleted forever.

data.name: PrivacyPageContent
data.value: This Privacy Policy describes how ActPro collects, uses and protects your personal information when you use our sports activity reservation service.

data.name: PrivacyInfoCollectedList
data.value: We collect personal information provided directly by you when using the platform: Account data: Name, email address and phone number upon registration. Place information (for partners): Sports facility location, photos and schedules. Technical data: IP address, browser type and cookies to improve site performance.

data.name: PrivacyHowWeUseList
data.value: Your data is processed for the following purposes: Facilitating and managing your sports activity reservations. Communication regarding confirmations, time changes or responses to inquiries. Improving platform functionality and user experience. Ensuring security and preventing fraud.

data.name: PrivacySharingList
data.value: We do not sell your personal data. We share information only with: Sports facilities: Only the necessary data for your reservation (name and time). Service providers: Partners like PMG "Akad. S. Korolyov" and hosting providers. Legal authorities: Only when required by law.

data.name: PrivacyYourRightsList
data.value: As a user, you have the right to: Access your personal data and request a copy. Correct inaccurate information. Delete your data ("Right to be forgotten"). Object to processing your data for marketing purposes.

data.name: PrivacySecurityText
data.value: We apply modern technical measures to protect your data, including SSL encryption and secure servers. However, please note that no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

data.name: PrivacyContactEmail
data.value: For questions about your data, please contact us at: contact@actprobg.com

data.name: TermsPageContent
data.value: These Terms of Service govern the use of the ActPro platform for booking sports activities and places. By using our services, you agree to these terms.

data.name: TermsReservationsText
data.value: Users can book sports activities only through the native system on the platform. ActPro acts as an intermediary between sports facilities and end users.

data.name: TermsRulesList
data.value: Users are required to provide accurate information upon registration. The reservation is valid only for the specified time and place. Unauthorized use of other profiles or abuse of the reservation system is prohibited.

data.name: TermsRefundText
data.value: All payments made in ActPro are final. Refunds are only allowed if the facility is unable to provide the service or under specific conditions stated in the particular listing.

data.name: TermsLiabilityText
data.value: ActPro is not responsible for the quality of workouts conducted or incidents occurring at the sports facilities. Users use the services at their own risk.

data.name: TermsChangesText
data.value: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. All changes take effect immediately after being posted on this page.

data.name: TermsContactEmail
data.value: For questions about our terms, please contact us at: contact@actprobg.com

data.name: SupportSubtitleText
data.value: Find answers to frequently asked questions and get the support you need for ActPro.

data.name: SupportFAQ1Question
data.value: How do I find free sports facilities?

data.name: SupportFAQ1Answer
data.value: Use the search engine on the homepage by selecting city and sport type. The system will show you all available places in real time.

data.name: SupportFAQ2Question
data.value: How do I book a time to play?

data.name: SupportFAQ2Answer
data.value: After selecting a place, click on the available time that is convenient for you and confirm the reservation. You will receive an email confirmation.

data.name: SupportFAQ3Answer
data.value: Yes, you can cancel a reservation through your profile in the "My Reservations" section at least 2 hours before the start time.

data.name: SupportFAQ4Question
data.value: How do I add my own sports facility?

data.name: SupportFAQ4Answer
data.value: Go to the "Add your place" section in the main menu. After registering as an owner, you will be able to manage your schedules.

data.name: SupportFAQ5Question
data.value: How do I contact customer support?

data.name: SupportFAQ5Answer
data.value: You can reach us through the app, email at contact@actprobg.com or phone +359 897 734 888. We are here to help with any questions or issues.

data.name: SupportContactSubtitle
data.value: Send us a support request and we will contact you as soon as possible.

data.name: SupportResponseTime
data.value: Response time: Within one business day

data.name: NewsDuplicateWarning
data.value: Warning: You have duplicate fields in the modal!

data.name: ConfirmationManageText
data.value: You can view your reservations in your profile or return to the homepage.

data.name: MyResManageText
data.value: Manage your upcoming and past visits Total:

data.name: MyResNoReservations
data.value: You don't have any reservations yet

data.name: MyResEmptyHistory
data.value: Your history is empty. Discover new interesting places and make your first reservation.

data.name: MyResCancelConfirmText
data.value: Do you want to cancel this reservation?

data.name: MyResErrorText
data.value: A problem occurred while communicating with the server.

data.name: SettingsPasswordWarning
data.value: Be careful who you share your password with. The ActPro team is not responsible for stolen accounts.

data.name: SettingsSecurityWarning
data.value: Be careful with actions in this panel. Profile deletion is irreversible.

data.name: ForgotEnterEmail
data.value: Enter your email and we will send you instructions.

data.name: RegisterAcceptTermsError
data.value: You must accept the terms and conditions.

data.name: ResReviewLimit
data.value: You have reached the limit of 3 comments for this place.

data.name: ResBookNeedProfile
data.value: To make a reservation, you must be part of ActPro.

data.name: ResMustBeLoggedIn
data.value: You must be logged in to add to favorites!

data.name: ResErrorProcessing
data.value: An error occurred while processing the request.

data.name: ThisSlotWillBeMarkedAsBusy
data.value: This time slot will be marked as busy in the public calendar.

data.name: NoClosedDates
data.value: No closed dates for this place

data.name: WeSentConfirmationLink
data.value: We sent a confirmation link to:

data.name: OpenEmailAndClick
data.value: Open the email and click the button

data.name: CheckSpamFolder
data.value: If you don't see the email, check the "Spam" folder

data.name: AfterConfirmationCanBook
data.value: After confirmation you can make reservations immediately

data.name: DragDropImagesOrClick
data.value: Drag images here or click to select

data.name: SupportedFormatsImage
data.value: Supported formats: JPG, PNG (Maximum 5MB per file)
